steps.t: You have found Dhúrstrok, Gorgar's stronghold. You should pick up the summoning horn to call Múta to your side.
You should find Náin's location. <rgb=#FF0000>If you need assistance, use the Call Múta skill to call Múta to your side. If you lose access to t…
Náin is trapped behind a locked gate. Gorgar's generals, Gâdh-and-Shum and Mozrúk the Wind-rider, hold the keys. <rgb=#FF0000>If you need assist…
You have obtained the keys needed to free Náin. You should return to the gate to unlock and open it. <rgb=#FF0000>If you need assistance, use th…
You have unlocked and opened the gate to Náin's prison. You should approach him to make sure he has not suffered grave injuries. <rgb=#FF0000>If…
